input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.6.5.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.6.5.2
            TITLE: bent shoulder harness mounting bars must:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.6.5.2: Bent Shoulder Harness Mounting Bars must:
F.6.5.2 Bent Shoulder Harness Mounting Bars must:  
a. Meet F.5.2.1 and F.5.2.2 
b. Have bracing members attached at the bend(s) and to the Main Hoop.   
• Material for this Shoulder Harness Mounting Bar Bracing must meet F.3.2.1.l 
• The included angle in side view between the Shoulder Harness Bar and the braces 
must be no less than 30°.

final_answer: F.6.5.2 Bent Shoulder Harness Mounting Bars must: a. Meet F.5.2.1 and F.5.2.2 b. Have bracing members attached at the bend(s) and to the Main Hoop. • Material for this Shoulder Harness Mounting Bar Bracing must meet F.3.2.1.l • The included angle in side view between the Shoulder Harness Bar and the braces must be no less than 30°.
